hero_testimonial: Well-built software turns ideas into fast, useful, and reliable experiences.
hero_notebook_alt: Open notebook representing Willian's software development work
about_paragraph_one: I am a Full Stack Developer focused on building modern, scalable web applications with a strong emphasis on user experience. I believe that quality software combines performance, simplicity, and a seamless experience in every interaction.
about_paragraph_two: I work across the entire development process, from data modeling and API development to creating responsive and intuitive user interfaces. My primary stack is based on TypeScript, using technologies such as React, Next.js, NestJS, Fastify, and Hono to build robust and well-structured solutions.
about_paragraph_three: Currently, I am expanding my knowledge within the .NET ecosystem, focusing on backend development, API design, scalability, software architecture, and best practices. I am constantly seeking new challenges and opportunities to grow as a developer and deliver solutions that create real value.
story_intro: A step-by-step evolution from programming logic to full-stack products, modern architecture, and artificial intelligence.
story_beginning_description: I started with the fundamentals of C and Python, building the logical reasoning and problem-solving foundation that would shape everything that followed.
story_web_description: I dove into HTML, CSS, and JavaScript, discovered the power of building for the browser, and never looked back.
story_fullstack_description: I adopted TypeScript and React, built my first APIs with Express, and progressed to Fastify and NestJS for production-ready backends.
story_modern_description: I adopted Next.js, modern ORM ecosystems, and robust development tools. I build complete products with integrated payment systems, automation, artificial intelligence, and high-performance interfaces. I am currently expanding my stack by mastering Docker to optimize application environments and deployments.
story_ai_description: I integrated Claude and Gemini into production applications, built intelligent APIs, automated workflows with Python, and created fluid, professional user experiences.
contact_section_description: Whether you want to build a software together, have a job opportunity, or need a service, I'd love to hear from you. Drop me a message and I'll get back to you as soon as possible.
contact_first_name_error: First name must be at least 2 characters
contact_last_name_error: Last name must be at least 2 characters
contact_message_error: Message must be at least 10 characters
chat_greeting: Hi! I am Wyatt, Willian's artificial intelligence.
chat_onboarding_help: You can ask me anything about Willian, how he can help you build your website, services, or microservices!
chat_not_connected: This feature is still being connected to the backend with Vercel AI SDK. Check back soon!
faq_a1: I created and developed the entire website myself, from design to code.
faq_a2: You can reach me on WhatsApp or call me at +55 21 99623-4356.
faq_a3: Only contact me if you have a real intention to sign a contract. I have no interest in non-committal conversations or negotiations without a concrete prospect of hiring.
faq_q4: What types of projects do you develop?
faq_a4: I develop everything from high-conversion landing pages to complex web systems, dashboards, and complete API integrations.
faq_a5: Yes. In addition to developing from scratch, I offer support and continuous evolution plans for already stabilized projects.
project_1_description: Full stack culinary platform for exploring recipes, favorites, category search, nutrition details, and an AI-powered cooking assistant.
project_1_status: Frontend hosted on Vercel. The API runs on Render and may take a few minutes to wake up.
project_download_dialog_description: This APK download is safe and was provided by the project author. Confirm to download and install it on Android.
project_2_description: Mobile fashion e-commerce app with authentication, catalog browsing, wishlist, cart, Stripe checkout, orders, and profile management, powered by a modular Fastify API.
project_2_status: Download available for Android only. The backend API is deployed on Render to support the app flows.
project_3_description: Full stack climate monitoring platform with a distributed data pipeline, real weather collection, RabbitMQ, Go worker, Python producer, NestJS API, and React dashboard.
project_3_status: Runs locally via Docker Compose: configure .env and run docker-compose up --build -d. Frontend on localhost:5173, API on localhost:3000, and Swagger on /docs.
project_4_description: Complete cashback calculation and management system built as a technical challenge, combining a FastAPI backend, React frontend, and PostgreSQL in a monorepo architecture.
project_4_status: Hosted on Render. Note: the database runs on Supabase free and may pause; if it does not start, wait a few seconds.
